topic: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view of a yellow NYC taxi entering the frame along a Times Square street.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Side-angle tracking of the taxi as it glides past neon Times Square signs.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Close-up on the taxi's chrome grille and bright yellow paint reflecting the lights.
parsed_generation.narration: A yellow NYC taxi enters Times Square in a front view, rolling along the neon-lit street. It continues with a side-angle pass past the signs and finishes with a close-up of the taxi's grille and reflective paint as it drives through the scene.

feedback:
The output centers on a yellow NYC taxi in Times Square, but the gold standard calls for an establishing wide shot of neon Times Square at night followed by a street-level tracking shot. The current script uses three shots and omits the LED billboards reflecting on the taxi hood. To tighten alignment: use [00:00-00:04] for a wide establishing shot and [00:04-00:08] for street-level tracking, explicitly note neon/LED signage reflections, and consider matching the two-shot cadence unless a three-shot arc is desired. The narration would benefit from adding context such as ambient neon colors or crowd movement rather than restating the visuals.
Failed checks: narration_adds_context
strengths: Clear subject focus on the taxi throughout
Distinct camera angles (front view, tracking, close-up)
fixes: Adopt gold-standard timestamp structure (e.g., two shots with [00:00-00:04] and [00:04-00:08])
Incorporate neon signage reflections and high-contrast lighting in the first shot
Use explicit wide establishing shot to set the Times Square context
